winner: I tried to drill into the pumpkin, but it was carved so well, I just ended up pumping out a bunch of seeds and a few startled jack-o'-lanterns.

candidates.text: I asked my toaster if it could drill a hole in this pumpkin, but it said, "You're kneading me." I'm going to report it for being an actual breadstick.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Creative wordplay with 'kneading' and 'breadstick,' good use of required words, concise and surprising."}

candidates.text: I thought I was being haunted by a ghost in my garden, but it turns out I just left my drill inside a hollowed-out pumpkin.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with specific, relatable scenario; concise and naturally funny."}

candidates.text: Why did the gardener start a construction business? He wanted to make a living by drilling into a pumpkin.
I drilled a hole through my pumpkin to make it into a pie, but then I realized I was just making a bigger hole in my wallet.
